focus: Tutti phase-by-phase build, then research+enhance each phase
nextResearchTheme: Brief v17 DONE (notes/ratings/cook-count finale + Browse; 189 tests). Brief v18 authored (what-should-I-cook suggestion). NEXT: Brief v18 item 1 - apps/web/src/suggest.ts: pure suggestMeal(meals:SavedMeal[], notes:NotesMap, opts:{nowMs}):{meal,reason}|null. Score each meal = ratingTerm (avg of dishes' notes ratings, neutral default ~3 when unrated) + varietyTerm (daysSince(meal.savedAt or max lastCookedAt of its dishes, nowMs), capped, so just-cooked demoted). Pick max; reason from dominant factor. daysSince(ms,nowMs) helper. null if empty. suggest.test.ts: high-rated-old beats low-rated-recent; just-cooked demoted vs equally-rated-older; empty->null; reason matches factor. Then item 2 Home suggestion card -> restoreMeal, item 3 fallback (thali/top library), item 5 Home test.
